passing_criteria.name: evicts
passing_criteria.check: (lambda c=BoundedCounter(2): (c.add('a'), c.add('b'), c.add('c'), 'a' not in c.keys()))()[-1] is True

passing_criteria.name: capacity
passing_criteria.check: (lambda c=BoundedCounter(2): (c.add('a'), c.add('b'), c.add('c'), len(c.keys()) <= 2))()[-1] is True
